recommendations.title: A Whisker Away
recommendations.overview: A peculiar girl transforms into a cat to catch her crush's attention. But before she realizes it, the line between human and animal starts to blur.

recommendations.title: Turning Red
recommendations.overview: Thirteen-year-old Mei is experiencing the awkwardness of being a teenager with a twist – when she gets too excited, she transforms into a giant red panda.

recommendations.title: Stopmotion
recommendations.overview: Ella Blake, a stop-motion animator struggling to control her demons after the loss of her overbearing mother, embarks upon the creation of a film that becomes the battleground for her sanity. As Ella’s mind starts to fracture, the characters in her p

recommendations.title: ME!ME!ME!
recommendations.overview: An anime-obsessed young man fantasizes about his favorite voluptuous heroines, but his sex-addled dream quickly transforms into a nightmare which threatens to consume him.

recommendations.title: Spirit Untamed
recommendations.overview: Lucky Prescott's life is changed forever when she moves from her home in the city to a small frontier town and befriends a wild mustang named Spirit.

recommendations.title: Mufasa: The Lion King
recommendations.overview: Mufasa, a cub lost and alone, meets a sympathetic lion named Taka, the heir to a royal bloodline. The chance meeting sets in motion an expansive journey of a group of misfits searching for their destiny.

recommendations.title: The Wolf House
recommendations.overview: After escaping from a religious colony in Chile, Maria seeks shelter in a mansion where she’s taken in by two pigs, its only inhabitants. Like in a stop-motion dream, the universe of the house reacts to her feelings. The animals slowly morph into hum

recommendations.title: Abraham Lincoln Vampire Hunter: The Great Calamity
recommendations.overview: A motion comic follow-up to a chapter from Abraham Lincoln Vampire Hunter novel where Abe's friend, Edgar Allan Poe, tells him the tale of historical Hungarian countess Elizabeth Bathory, often tied to vampire legends due to her brutality.

recommendations.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
recommendations.overview: A captured mustang remains determined to return to his herd no matter what.

recommendations.title: No Date, No Signature
recommendations.overview: Kaveh Nariman is a Doctor in the medical examiner's office. One day at his work he meets a corpse which is very familiar to him.
